title: Predicting System Failure Through Capacity Planning
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of monitoring key performance indicators, analyzing trends, and predicting the point at which system demand will exceed available capacity, leading to failure.
elements: Current System Performance Metrics (CPU, Memory, Disk I/O, Network Bandwidth)
Predicted Failure Point (Intersection of Demand and Capacity)
relationships: Metrics are analyzed to establish a baseline and identify trends
Trends are extrapolated to forecast future demand
The forecast is compared against the known system capacity threshold
The point where the forecasted demand line crosses the capacity threshold predicts the time of system failure
